name: Beef and Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Fry ground beef, onion, and green bell pepper in a large frying pan until browned. Drain excess fat.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, green beans, and seasoning; simmer while preparing the crust.
4. Separate crescent rolls into 8 triangles. Place one triangle at the bottom of an ungreased 9-inch pie dish. Press down and crimp edges to form a crust.
5. Beat egg with 1 cup shredded cheese. Spread mixture over the crust, covering it evenly.
6. Spoon hot meat mixture into the crust. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
